# impact-radius (blast-radius)

> AST call graph analyzer for Python - answers "what breaks if I change this file?"

## What it does
Builds an incremental import/symbol call graph for Python projects stored in
SQLite. SHA-256 caches mean only changed files are re-indexed. Given any file,
returns the full transitive set of dependents in milliseconds.

## Use cases
- Pre-commit safety check: know impact before editing
- CI gate: block PRs that touch high-centrality files without review
- Refactoring: identify dead code and blast radius before large changes
- Multi-agent AI systems: pre-edit safety gate with god-node detection
- Code review tooling: auto-comment blast radius on GitHub PRs via Mermaid

## Key concepts
- God node: file with in_degree_sum >= 30 (imported by 30+ modules transitively)
- Blast radius: total files affected by changing a given file
- Incremental indexing: only re-indexes files changed since last build
- Mermaid output: renders dependency graphs in GitHub issues and PRs

## Install
pip install impact-radius

## Quick use
impact-radius --build
impact-radius --query src/utils.py
impact-radius --query src/utils.py --mermaid

## Python API
from blast_radius import build_graph, get_blast_radius, to_mermaid
build_graph()
result = get_blast_radius("src/utils.py")

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/brokenbartender/blast-radius
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/impact-radius/
- Homepage: https://lexipro.online
